/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/Blacked_Hole.dir/src/3d/Inputhandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blacked_Hole.dir/src/3d/RayTracer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blacked_Hole.dir/src/3d/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blacked_Hole.dir/src/3d/Simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blacked_Hole.dir/src/3d/main.cpp.o -o Blacked_Hole  -Wl,-rpath,/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libraylib.so -L/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib -lraylib
